mapper.select: SELECT COMPETENCY_ID AS competencyId, CALC_TYPE AS calcType, SCORE_DELTA AS scoreDelta FROM COMPETENCY_ACTION_SCORE_POLICY WHERE CALC_TYPE = #{calcType} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY COMPETENCY_ID

WITH course_skills AS ( SELECT cs.SKILL_ID FROM COURSE_SKILL cs WHERE cs.COURSE_ID = #{courseId} UNION SELECT chs.SKILL_ID FROM COURSE_CHAPTER cc JOIN CHAPTER_SKILL chs ON chs.CHAPTER_ID = cc.CHAPTER_ID WHERE cc.COURSE_ID = #{courseId} AND cc.USE_YN = 'Y' ) SELECT scs.COMPETENCY_ID AS competencyId, scs.CALC_TYPE AS calcType, MAX(scs.SCORE_DELTA) AS scoreDelta FROM SKILL_COMPETENCY_SCORE scs WHERE scs.USE_YN = 'Y' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM course_skills course_skill JOIN SKILL skill ON skill.SKILL_ID = course_skill.SKILL_ID WHERE course_skill.SKILL_ID = scs.SKILL_ID OR skill.PARENT_SKILL_ID = scs.SKILL_ID ) GROUP BY scs.COMPETENCY_ID, scs.CALC_TYPE ORDER BY scs.COMPETENCY_ID, scs.CALC_TYPE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMPETENCY_SCORE_HISTORY ( HISTORY_ID, USER_ID, COMPETENCY_ID, SCORE, CALC_TYPE, CALCULATED_AT ) SELECT COMPETENCY_SCORE_HISTORY_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{competencyId}, LEAST(100, NVL(( SELECT ucs.SCORE FROM USER_COMPETENCY_SCORE ucs WHERE ucs.USER_ID = #{userId} AND ucs.COMPETENCY_ID = #{competencyId} ), 70) + #{scoreDelta}), #{calcType}, SYSDATE FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM COMPETENCY_SCORE_HISTORY csh WHERE csh.USER_ID = #{userId} AND csh.COMPETENCY_ID = #{competencyId} AND csh.CALC_TYPE = #{calcType} )
mapper.update: MERGE INTO USER_COMPETENCY_SCORE target USING ( SELECT #{userId} AS USER_ID, #{competencyId} AS COMPETENCY_ID, #{scoreDelta} AS SCORE_DELTA FROM DUAL ) source ON ( target.USER_ID = source.USER_ID AND target.COMPETENCY_ID = source.COMPETENCY_ID ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET target.SCORE = LEAST(100, target.SCORE + source.SCORE_DELTA), target.CALCULATED_AT = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( USER_SCORE_ID, USER_ID, COMPETENCY_ID, SCORE, CALCULATED_AT ) VALUES ( USER_COMPETENCY_SCORE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, source.USER_ID, source.COMPETENCY_ID, LEAST(100, 70 + source.SCORE_DELTA), SYSDATE )
